response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or RAG systems, and his resume omits key required technologies like vector databases and explicit cloud AI deployment experience.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and scalable systems
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or production RAG systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or LLM optimization metrics
Limited detail on cloud-native AI deployment patterns or enterprise customer-facing technical leadership
